extensionDescription.message: Gyaran rubutun Larabci na ƙwararru ga kowane gidan yanar gizo. Yana gyara tazarar haruffa, yana saka kyawawan nau'ikan haruffan Larabci, kuma yana gyara matsalolin ma'ana waɗanda ke haifar da rubutun Larabci da ya watse.

masterToggleAriaLabel.message: Kunna ko kashe fadada Arabic Type

letterSpacingNote.message: Tazarar haruffa koyaushe ana saita shi zuwa 0 don hana rabuwar haruffan Larabci. Wannan shine mafi yawan sanadin karyewar ma'anar Larabci akan yanar gizo.

forceRTLDescription.message: Yana tilasta jagorar dama-zuwa-hagu akan tubalan rubutun Larabci. Kunna don rukunin yanar gizo inda Larabci ya bayyana kuskure hagu-zuwa-dama.

diacriticsDescription.message: Yana inganta ma'anar alamun wasali na Larabci (tashkeel) don hana yanke sama da ƙasa layin rubutu.

disableSiteLabel.message: Kashe akan wannan rukunin yanar gizo

siteFontOverrideLabel.message: Yi amfani da nau'in rubutu daban akan wannan rukunin yanar gizo

siteFontOverrideDescription.message: Zaɓi nau'in rubutu daban don wannan rukunin yanar gizo kawai, yana soke zaɓin rubutunku na duniya.

siteFontPickerLabel.message: Nau'in rubutu don wannan rukunin yanar gizo

exceptionsLabel.message: Rukunin Yanar Gizon da aka Kashe

exceptionsEmpty.message: Babu rukunin yanar gizon da aka kashe.

fontSourceNote.message: Nau'ikan rubutu ana ba da su ta Google Fonts. Yana buƙatar haɗin intanet don ɗaukar farko.

fontPrivacyNote.message: Ana aika buƙatun rubutu zuwa sabar Google. Dubi fonts.google.com/privacy.

statusArabicDetected.message: An gano rubutun Larabci — abubuwa $COUNT$ an gyara.

statusGlobalMode.message: Amfani da yanayin duniya — an samo sifofin lang/dir.

statusNoArabic.message: Ba a gano rubutun Larabci akan wannan shafin ba.

statusSiteDisabled.message: An kashe akan wannan rukunin yanar gizo.

statusContentScriptUnavailable.message: Ba za a iya shiga wannan shafin ba.

removeExceptionAriaLabel.message: Cire $HOSTNAME$ daga rukunin yanar gizon da aka kashe
